Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: Jacoby isn’t so happy about Amber’s business success and called off the wedding. A compatibility test decides their future.
Video.title: Rouzan vs Lunkins

Video.summary: Shaylen petitions her boyfriend, Quan, to take a polygraph test because she suspects he's cheating with his ex.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Hudson

Video.summary: Destiny and Tavian clash over trust, paternity and financial woes, seeking answers that could make or break their future.
Video.title: Murphy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A woman says her husband is failing to go the distance in their marriage.
Video.title: Covington vs. Covington

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: A lie detector test could decide the fate of Andrecia and Alfred's tumultuous marriage filled with suspicion and regret.
Video.title: Taylor vs. Taylor

Video.summary: Were they loans? Was she funding her gambling boyfriend in order to rake in the profit?
Video.title: Going for Broke

Video.summary: Is James splitting hairs with Carle over his bad hair day or is there just a hair more about this case?
Video.title: Splitting Hairs

Video.summary: Michael, a clown and Elvis Presley impersonator, is suing his talent agent for unpaid dues.
Video.title: Bonzo and the Hound Dog

Video.summary: Sean Amey is suing his former roommates for his security deposit after being forced out of the apartment through calculated scheming. The roommates admit to lying but say that he deserved it.
Video.title: Rowdy Roommate Ruckus

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: Will is bringing Jazmine to court in a last-ditch effort to save their relationship from the stresses of social media.
Video.title: Bouie vs. Jackson

Video.summary: A Georgia woman suspects her longtime boyfriend of cheating because he has not yet proposed.
Video.title: Harris vs. Harris

Video.summary: A paternity battle ignites as Janay seeks justice, while Dale's doubts and secrets keep him on the defensive.
Video.title: Smith vs. Anderson

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: A 9-year age difference and past infidelity have Samoria questioning her relationship with Marlon. Polygraph results will determine their future.
Video.title: Fitzpatrick vs Shields

Video.summary: Allison is suing the taxi driver she hired to drive her home after a medical procedure for kicking her out.
Video.title: You Threw Me Out Of Your Taxi

Image.alt: You Threw Me Out Of Your Taxi
You Threw Me Out Of Your Taxi
You Threw Me Out Of Your Taxi

Video.summary: Miguel is suing his friend of 30 years because he believes the defendant is the cause of his dog's death.
Video.title: Dog Death Dilemma

Video.summary: Forrest hired the defendant to make a music video but claims he took too much creative liberty.
Video.title: Music Video Disaster

Video.summary: Mirabel Diaz says she’s known the defendant, Toni, for 10 years because she was an exotic dancer at her adult entertainment business. She ended up investing in the defendant’s online adult toy website and it’s been almost two years and hasn’t been paid back her initial investment, nor her profits. Toni says Mirabel knew full well the return on her investment could take anywhere from 1-3 years and is just getting antsy. Toni is accused of stripping an investor.
Video.title: Stripping an Investor

Video.summary: Rachael sues ex-roommate Jean for $750 after he gave her a bounced check for her security deposit. She claims he caused chaos by moving 15 people in, while he accuses her of theft and promiscuity. Both bring explosive allegations to court.
Video.title: Roommate Sex Refusal

Video.summary: Irma demands a refund for the party bus she rented from LaToya, stating it wasn't decorated properly.
Video.title: Unhappy Birthday Party

Video.summary: Ebony is here to get help for her brother who's opioid addiction worsened after his wife overdosed.
Video.title: Hooked on Opioids

Video.summary: Paulita is suing her baby daddy for the value of a car, saying she left him because he's an abusive drunk.
Video.title: Paying Up for the Car

Video.summary: The plaintiff says that after her 9-year-old son passed away, she became addicted to heroin but has been clean for 30 years; she is suing her former friend for repayment of a loan, while the ex-friend denies owing her for anything.
Video.title: Past Bonds and Present Debts

Video.summary: Sherman is suing is ex-wife because he claims during their marriage she cheated on him with his best friend.
Video.title: Threatening an Ex

Video.summary: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.
Video.title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Image.alt: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Video.summary: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for rent and emotional distress because he cheated on her with their roommate.
Video.title: The Roommate Affair

Video.summary: Daryl is suing his ex-friend for missing belongings that he believes were sold to fuel a gambling addiction.
Video.title: Gambling the Friendship

Video.summary: Nigel says that he got ripped off. Now he wants his money back from producer Daunte.
Video.title: Beating the Bank

Video.summary: They were old time band buddies that had a rockin new idea, then they say an old band buddy lured them in with a sweet song, but when his tune fell flat, they fell between a Rock N' Roll and a hard place.
Video.title: Band Buddy Battle!

Video.summary: Deputy Payne exposes the jumbled and dysfunctional mind of a habitual alcoholic.
Video.title: Drunk as a Skunk

Video.summary: WENET and the SED demonstrate a large scale marijuana bust near an elementary school.
Video.title: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Image.alt: Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard
Mexican Cartel Pot Grow in Our Backyard

Video.summary: The Western El Dorado Narcotics Enforcement Team shines a light on the destruction of our public land by illegal commercial Mexican cartel grows.
Video.title: Marijuana vs. the Environment

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana arrests a central figure in a major ID theft ring.
Video.title: Mobile ID Theft Factory

Video.summary: WENET breaks up a party to arrest a group of illegal Mexicans for cock fighting.
Video.title: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Image.alt: Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People
Pot, Pipe Bombs and Clueless People

Video.summary: Deputy Fontana responds to an overturned vehicle. An intoxicated driver is found sleeping behind the wheel of his vehicle.
Video.title: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Image.alt: Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy
Just Another Day in the Life of a Deputy

Video.summary: An uncooperative felon tests the patience of the SED.
Video.title: Special Enforcement Detail Work

Video.summary: Deputy Campora arrests two men in possession of drugs and with felony warrants. Deputies Brady and Ford enforce a restraining order.
Video.title: What Bump in My Pants?

Video.summary: Deputy Adams eradicates an indoor and outdoor marijuana grow.
Video.title: But I have a Prescription!

Video.summary: Deputy Turnbull makes a visit to a known flop house.
Video.title: Dopers Come Together

Video.summary: A Parole Agent captures the suspect trying to hide in a van. California agents bust a parolee's house door.
Video.title: Always On Alert

Video.summary: 4 parolees are shocked when they are searched and arrested. A mother happily gives agents her son's location.
Video.title: Surprise Visit

Video.summary: Colorado Parole Officers relentlessly search for a fugitive but catch another fugitive and find a drug lab.
Video.title: Behind Closed Doors

Video.summary: A parolee tries to avoid arrest by hiding under a pile of clothing. A parolee thinks he can outrun agents.
Video.title: Expect the Unexpected

Video.summary: Between a search a chase in the snow a surrender and home visit the Agents have their work cut out for them.
Video.title: No Rest for the Wicked
